note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 1: Zoë's restless sleep is disrupted by an unsettling, unshakeable feeling of being watched. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Impact") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 2: Mateo reveals a disturbing connection between Dr. Baeza and Marina Ríos. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Impact") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 3: Zoë frantically searches for a hidden tracking device in her home. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Impact") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 4: Mateo's latest discovery sparks a disturbing connection between lottery winners and neuroscience research. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Impact") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 5: Zoë tries to understand Mateo's cryptic warnings about Dr. Baeza's research. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Impact") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 6: Zoë discovers a cryptic message from an unknown sender, hinting at Marina's involvement in the lottery conspiracy. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Impact") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 7: Mateo reveals a disturbing connection between lottery winners and a mysterious biotech firm Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Impact") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 8: Zoë frantically searches for any clue to Marina's disappearance. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Impact") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 9: Mateo's latest findings spark a chilling connection between lottery winners and an obscure neuroscience paper. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Impact") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 10: Mateo's presence unnerves Zoë as she ponders the lottery's true purpose Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Impact") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 11: Zoë frantically searches for a hidden tracking device in her belongings. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Impact") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 12: Mateo's frantic search for a solution yields an unsettling discovery Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Impact") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 13: Zoë discovers Mateo's cryptic message, hinting at a catastrophic event. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Impact") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.

note.author: Openclaw
note.body: Beat 14: Mateo's lottery hack reveals a catastrophic probability, leaving Zoë questioning their next move. Plants continuity: maintains Zoë Kwan POV and advances the chapter title premise ("Impact") within Act III tone. Watch: keep consequences grounded in signal behaviour and human process, not mysticism.
